related_requirements.requirement: The system must be scalable to handle an increase in the number of users and data volume.
related_requirements.explanation: The system is designed as a collection of small, independent services that communicate with each other, allowing individual services to scale based on demand.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be easy to maintain and update with clear and complete documentation.
related_requirements.explanation: Each service runs in its own Docker container and handles specific responsibilities, promoting modularity which aids in maintenance and updates.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an uptime of 99.9% and be able to recover from failures in less than 1 hour.
related_requirements.explanation: Independent services running in separate containers isolate failures, preventing a single point of failure from taking down the entire system.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be compatible with the most common web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and mobile devices.
related_requirements.explanation: Follows the standard web client-server model where the browser (client) requests resources and renders the interface, ensuring compatibility across devices.

related_requirements.requirement: The user interface must be intuitive and easy to use for non-technical users.
related_requirements.explanation: Utilizes Client Components rendered in the browser that are interactable, separating presentation from server-side logic to optimize user experience.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow logged-in or non-logged-in users to view the profiles of the various companies as well as their products.
related_requirements.explanation: The server processes logic and data while the client displays the requested resources, enabling public access to specific data views.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must protect user information through secure authentication.
related_requirements.explanation: Acts as a reverse proxy handling SSL termination and redirects HTTP to HTTPS, securing data transmission.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow logged-in or non-logged-in users to view the profiles of the various companies as well as their products.
related_requirements.explanation: Manages routing of HTTP/HTTPS requests from the outside world to the internal System Service based on defined routing rules.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow registering new users to the system.
related_requirements.explanation: Handles business logic and authentication as the core application logic and user interface.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be able to authenticate existing users via email.
related_requirements.explanation: Integrates with external services (Google Auth, Brevo) and handles authentication logic within the application.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must be able to modify its public profile/page at any time, as well as preview it while editing.
related_requirements.explanation: Serves the web application and handles business logic required for profile modification and preview functionality.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be available in different languages.
related_requirements.explanation: As the core application serving the web application, it manages the UI rendering which supports language availability.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be compatible with the most common web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and mobile devices.
related_requirements.explanation: Built with Next.js framework utilizing Client Components rendered in the browser, ensuring cross-browser compatibility.

related_requirements.requirement: RT1 - External Keys(User, id) (Company, User:id), (Donor, User:id), (Product, name + User:id), (Route, id), (MarketZone, name + type), (Return, id).
related_requirements.explanation: Schema managed via Prisma ORM includes tables for users, accounts, sessions, companies, profiles, products, routes, etc., enforcing data relationships.

related_requirements.requirement: RT3 - The name attribute cannot be repeated among the Companies.
related_requirements.explanation: Provides persistent relational storage where schema definitions enforce uniqueness constraints on attributes like company names.

related_requirements.requirement: RT4 - The name attribute cannot be repeated among the Products of the same Company.
related_requirements.explanation: Database schema manages tables for products linked to companies, ensuring data integrity and uniqueness rules.

related_requirements.requirement: Products/routes/company profile can only be editable and accessible by that company.
related_requirements.explanation: Persistent storage holds the data that is accessed and modified according to access control logic enforced by the system service querying this database.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be able to authenticate existing users via email.
related_requirements.explanation: Handles user authentication via third-party identity provider integrated via Next-auth/Auth.js libraries.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must protect user information through secure authentication.
related_requirements.explanation: Uses established identity providers (Google) to manage secure authentication tokens and callbacks.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be able to save all images of all products/users of the system.
related_requirements.explanation: Provides cloud storage specifically for user-uploaded files such as product images and logos.

related_requirements.requirement: Every route must have an associated budget (which can be 0) which the user must be able to pay using the system when returning the product.
related_requirements.explanation: Processes payments for product return fees initiated by the System Service.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an affiliation/plan system for companies that want certain advantages (it has three plans: free, basic, and premium).
related_requirements.explanation: Processes payments for subscription plans and handles webhooks for subscription changes.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be able to authenticate existing users via email.
related_requirements.explanation: Manages transactional emails (e.g., MagicLinks) which facilitate email-based authentication flows.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow registering new users to the system.
related_requirements.explanation: Manages email communications required during the registration process.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an uptime of 99.9% and be able to recover from failures in less than 1 hour.
related_requirements.explanation: Monitors and tracks errors and exceptions, providing visibility necessary for rapid recovery and maintaining uptime.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be easy to maintain and update with clear and complete documentation.
related_requirements.explanation: Uses docker-compose.yml to define and orchestrate multiple containers, simplifying deployment and maintenance.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be scalable to handle an increase in the number of users and data volume.
related_requirements.explanation: Containerization platform packages and runs application services, facilitating horizontal scaling of containers.

related_requirements.requirement: The user interface must be intuitive and easy to use for non-technical users.
related_requirements.explanation: Used to build the User Interface by creating independent, reusable components that encapsulate logic and styles, promoting a consistent and usable UI.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be easy to maintain and update with clear and complete documentation.
related_requirements.explanation: Promotes modularity and maintainability by allowing components to be updated independently.

related_requirements.requirement: The user interface must be intuitive and easy to use for non-technical users.
related_requirements.explanation: Implemented using event listeners where observers subscribe to a subject to receive notifications of state changes, ensuring responsive UI updates.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an uptime of 99.9% and be able to recover from failures in less than 1 hour.
related_requirements.explanation: Ensures a class has only one instance (specifically Prisma Client) to prevent multiple connections to the database, enhancing stability during development and hot-reload.
